originalTitle: Forget the ‘Sell America’ trade: Why U.S. markets keep proving the naysayers wrong
summary: Foreign investors are still pouring money into U.S. assets, and the dollar remains the undisputed global reserve currency.
content: Foreign investors are still pouring money into U.S. assets, and the dollar remains the undisputed global reserve currency.
chineseTitle: 忘记“推销美国”贸易：为什么美国市场不断证明反对者是错误的
chineseSummary: 外国投资者仍在向美国资产注入资金，美元仍然是无可争议的全球储备货币。
chineseContent: 外国投资者仍在向美国资产注入资金，美元仍然是无可争议的全球储备货币。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
